Class DeepSeekChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<B extends DeepSeekChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<B>>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.chat.prompt.DefaultChatOptionsBuilder<B>
org.springframework.ai.model.tool.DefaultToolCallingChatOptions.Builder<B>
org.springframework.ai.deepseek.DeepSeekChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<B>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cloneable, ChatOptions.Builder<B>, ToolCallingChatOptions.Builder<B>
Direct Known Subclasses:
DeepSeekChatOptions.Builder
Enclosing class:
DeepSeekChatOptions
protected abstract static class DeepSeekChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<B extends DeepSeekChatOptions.AbstractBuilder<B>> extends DefaultToolCallingChatOptions.Builder<B>
Author:
Geng Rong, Sebastien Deleuze
